nasb.text: Then it came about when the ark set out that Moses said, “Rise up, O Lord! And let Your enemies be scattered, And let those who hate You flee before You.”

esv.text: And whenever the ark set out, Moses said, “Arise, O Lord, and let your enemies be scattered, and let those who hate you flee before you.”

cnv.text: 約櫃起行的時候，摩西就說： “耶和華啊，求你起來， 願你的仇敵四散； 願恨你的人從你面前逃跑。”

ccb.text: 每当约柜出发的时候，摩西就说：“耶和华啊，求你兴起，击溃你的敌人，使恨你的人逃窜。”
